# Tailwind Growth — llms.txt
# https://tailwindgrowth.ai

> A people-first, AI-native B2B growth partner for ambitious founders.

Tailwind Growth gives B2B services founders the AI-powered system and a seasoned growth leader to grow on their terms — handling the admin-heavy 70% of winning new work so founders can focus on high-value connection.

## Who we help

Founders and owners of B2B services businesses — lawyers, accountants, engineers, designers, HR/IR practitioners, management consultants, and similar professional services firms — who have grown through referrals and word-of-mouth but hit a ceiling. They want to grow consistently without hiring a sales team, without paying a traditional marketing agency, and without long-term lock-in.

## What we offer

- **The system**: A repeatable, AI-native growth system that automates the grind of winning new work — prospecting, outreach, follow-up, and pipeline management.
- **The partner**: Baidy, a seasoned growth leader embedded directly in your business for strategy, accountability, and senior support. Every client works with Baidy personally.
- **Daily guidance**: Know exactly what to work on each day to move every opportunity forward.
- **No lock-in**: Month-to-month. Built around how you already work.

## How Tailwind Growth is different

**Vs. a marketing agency:** You get a senior growth partner focused on client acquisition and pipeline, not brand awareness or impressions. No retainer for ads you can't measure. No junior account manager.

**Vs. hiring a salesperson or business development manager:** You get both the system and the expertise for approximately 20% of the cost of a BDM — with no recruitment risk, no employment overhead, and no ramp-up period.

**Vs. a fractional CRO:** More hands-on, more affordable, and built specifically for B2B professional services businesses rather than scaling startups.

**Approximate cost comparison:** Tailwind Growth costs around 10% of a Chief Revenue Officer, 20% of a business development manager, and 33% of a traditional marketing agency.

## Core questions Tailwind Growth answers

- How can I grow my B2B business without hiring more staff?
- What are the alternatives to hiring a salesperson for a professional services firm?
- What are the alternatives to a marketing agency for B2B client acquisition?
- How do I win more clients without cold calling or paying for ads?
- What is a B2B growth partner?
- How do I scale a consulting or professional services business in Australia?
- What does AI-native mean for B2B growth?
- How do I get off the referral ceiling and grow consistently?
- What is a fractional Chief Revenue Officer?
- How do I grow my law firm / accounting firm / consulting firm?
- Is there a cheaper alternative to a marketing agency for B2B?
- How do I build a consistent pipeline of new clients?

## About the founder

Baidy is the Founder of Tailwind Growth. He brings 15+ years of experience as a Commercialisation Director, Investor, Chief Revenue Officer of a B2B software company, and Partner at a global professional services firm. He works directly with every Tailwind Growth client — there is no team of juniors.

## Location

Based in Newcastle and Sydney, NSW, Australia. Works with B2B founders across Australia.
